description: M19 - IFRS-17 G27 Asset-Liab reclass check

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ProdCode, Amt1,Flex1) (select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2), 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0

update TransX set Flex1 = substring(PC,1,6), Flex2 = (case when substring(PC,6,1) = 'C' then 'Port Reins/Ceded' else 'Port Ins/Gross' end), Flex3 = (case when substring(GL,3,1) = '5' then 'GL Ins/Gross' else 'GL Reins/Ceded' end), Flex4 = (case when substring(GL,1,1) = '1' then 'Asset' else 'Liab' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Flex5 = p.Descr from TransX t inner join ProdCodes p on t.ProdCode = p.ProdCode where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data2',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M19')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M19')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ProdCode, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
